scripts.test: bun run plugins/registry.test.ts && bun run plugins/registry-roundtrip.test.ts && bun run plugins/migration.test.ts && bash scripts/oc-swarm-smoke.test.sh
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run eval && bun run check:readme && bun run check:shell
scripts.ci:with-e2e: bun run ci && bun run test:e2e
